text.title: JS/TS Frontend Testing Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the testing-js-ts-frontend methodology end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-runner
step.action: Read runner; configure globals:true OR add explicit imports to every test file.

step.name: emit-test-file
step.action: Write Component.test.tsx using describe/it from the runner; render() from @testing-library/<framework>; query by role/label/text.

step.name: interactions-via-user-event
step.action: For each interaction, use userEvent.click / userEvent.type / userEvent.keyboard. Wrap with user = userEvent.setup() at top of test.

step.name: axe-a11y
step.action: Add jest-axe expect(await axe(container)).toHaveNoViolations() per component test file.

step.name: audit-snapshots
step.action: List toMatchSnapshot calls; for each, decide replace with targeted assertion or justify with comment.
